GameBlazer Sales Explorer

10022 completed sales · 326 players · through Jun 28, 2026  |  Value window since

Fair value uses this player's clean sales; thin samples fall back to the position EV model.

Paste the output of your marketplace-listings scanner below. Each listing is priced against its fair value; underpriced ones float to the top.

Auto-sync from GitHub

Paste the raw GitHub URL of your sales CSV. The app pulls the latest each time it opens, so every device stays current without re-uploading.

Or paste rows from your sales scan (the same text you copy from the console). New sales are deduped and saved on this device, on top of the built-in history.
